---
title: "CIS 351 Assignment 1"
format:
  html: 
    embed-resources: true
---

**Question 1.** Load the `tidyverse` and `janitor` packages.
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

library(janitor)
```

**Question 2.** Load the *Carbon Dioxide Uptake in Grass Plants* data by running `CO2` in an R code chunk.

```{r}
CO2
```
